 {"id":"phage_explorer-z49z","content_hash":"e912204bef8f11353e8aad0ad81c90ac7cc9095e17c0e65fea842da07f58c5ae","title":"Verify all phages have 3D model support","description":"","notes":"# Verify All Phages Have 3D Model Support

## Problem Statement

The user reported that "Lambda phage and other important critical phages" are missing from the web interface. This needs investigation and verification.

## Current State

### Phage Catalog
**File:** `/packages/data-pipeline/src/phage-catalog.ts`

The catalog includes 12 phages with PDB IDs:

| Phage | Accession | PDB IDs |
|-------|-----------|---------|
| Lambda | NC_001416.1 | 7VI9, 8K35 |
| T4 | NC_000866.4 | 5VF3 |
| T7 | NC_001604.1 | 3J4G |
| PhiX174 | NC_001422.1 | 2BPA |
| MS2 | NC_001417.2 | 2MS2 |
| M13 | NC_003287.2 | 2MJZ |
| P22 | NC_002371.2 | 5UU5 |
| Phi29 | NC_011048.1 | 1MN8 |
| Mu | NC_000929.1 | 4FCY, 1WRU, 5YVQ |
| Phi6 | NC_003714.1 | 4BTG |
| SPbeta | NC_001884.1 | 5Y24, 6HP7, 5XYB |
| T5 | NC_005859.1 | 8ZVI, 6OMC, 5TJT |

Lambda IS in the catalog. So why isn't it showing?

## Investigation Tasks

### 1. Check Database Build
Verify the phage.db contains all 12 phages:
```bash
bun run build:db
sqlite3 phage.db "SELECT name, pdb_ids FROM phages ORDER BY name"
```

### 2. Check Web Repository Query
**File:** `/packages/web/src/db/SqlJsRepository.ts`

Verify `listPhages()` returns all phages:
```typescript
const result = this.db.exec(`
  SELECT id, name, accession, family, ...
  FROM phages
  ORDER BY name
`);
```

### 3. Check 3D Model Loading
For each phage, verify:
1. `phage.pdbIds` array is populated
2. First PDB ID resolves to a valid RCSB URL
3. Structure loads without error

### 4. RCSB Availability
Some older PDB entries may have been superseded or removed. Check each PDB ID:
```bash
for pdb in 7VI9 8K35 5VF3 3J4G 2BPA 2MS2 2MJZ 5UU5 1MN8 4FCY 4BTG 5Y24 8ZVI; do
  curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code} $pdb\n" https://files.rcsb.org/download/$pdb.pdb
done
```

## Potential Issues

### Issue 1: Database Not Rebuilt
If `bun run build:db` hasn't been run after catalog updates, the database may be stale.

### Issue 2: JSON Parsing
PDB IDs are stored as JSON in SQLite. Check parsing:
```typescript
pdbIds: safeJsonParse<string[]>(phage.pdbIds, []),
```

### Issue 3: Web App Cache
IndexedDB may have cached an older database version.

## Remediation Steps

1. **Rebuild database:**
   ```bash
   rm phage.db
   bun run build:db
   ```

2. **Clear web app cache:**
   - Open DevTools > Application > IndexedDB
   - Delete phage-explorer database
   - Reload

3. **Verify all phages load:**
   - Each phage should appear in the list
   - Each phage with PDB IDs should show 3D model

## Testing Checklist

- [ ] Lambda phage appears in the list
- [ ] Lambda 3D model loads (PDB 7VI9 or 8K35)
- [ ] All 12 catalog phages appear
- [ ] All 12 phages have working 3D models
- [ ] No console errors during structure loading

## Definition of Done

- [ ] All 12 catalog phages visible in web UI
- [ ] All phages with PDB IDs load 3D structures
- [ ] Any missing/broken PDB IDs replaced with alternatives
- [ ] Database rebuild script works correctly","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-09T11:25:47.724489-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-09T11:44:14.817108-05:00","closed_at":"2025-12-09T11:44:14.817108-05:00","source_repo":".","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"phage_explorer-z49z","depends_on_id":"phage_explorer-vru3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-09T11:26:23.617718-05:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}

 {"id":"phage_explorer-zkp","content_hash":"b47df15e7407daffaffefbb023b76626f24f62521985f86927b9564c7bd8eb89","title":"[WEB-P5] Advanced Features: Heavy Analysis & Novel Capabilities","description":"# Phase 5: Advanced Features (Target: Weeks 9-11)

## Purpose
Implement computationally intensive analyses and leverage web-only capabilities not available in the TUI.

## Why This Matters
These features differentiate the web version from the TUI. WebGPU enables massive parallelism impossible in terminals. WebRTC enables collaboration impossible in local apps. Video export enables sharing impossible without GUIs.

## Deliverables
1. **Advanced Analysis Overlays** - K-mer, module detection, selection pressure
2. **WebGPU Acceleration** - GPU k-mer counting, parallel analysis
3. **Collaborative Sessions** - WebRTC-based real-time collaboration
4. **Export Capabilities** - Clipboard, FASTA, video, file system
5. **Matrix Rain Effect** - Background visual effect

## Advanced Analyses

### K-mer Anomaly Cartography
- High-resolution k-mer frequency deviation
- Windowed analysis across genome
- Anomaly highlighting

### Module Detection
- Functional gene clustering
- Operon boundary prediction
- Regulatory region identification

### Selection Pressure (dN/dS)
- Synonymous vs non-synonymous ratio
- Per-gene and sliding window
- Evolutionary pressure visualization

### Transcription Flow
- Promoter strength mapping
- Terminator detection
- Transcription unit visualization

## Web-Only Features

### WebGPU Compute (Feature Flagged)
```typescript
// GPU-accelerated k-mer counting
// 10-100x speedup for large sequences
async function gpuKmerCount(sequence, k): Map<string, number>
```

### WebRTC Collaboration
```typescript
class CollaborationManager {
  createSession(): Promise<string>  // Returns session ID
  joinSession(id): Promise<void>    // Join existing session
  broadcastStateChange(change): void // Sync with peers
}
```

### Export Capabilities
| Format | API Used |
|--------|----------|
| Rich clipboard | Clipboard API (HTML + plain) |
| FASTA | Clipboard/File System Access |
| Video | WebCodecs |
| Files | File System Access API |

### Matrix Rain
- DNA/amino acid characters
- Background decoration during loading
- Configurable density and speed

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] All advanced analyses complete in reasonable time (<30s for 100kb)
- [ ] Progress streaming shows incremental results
- [ ] Results match TUI implementation exactly
- [ ] WebGPU provides measurable speedup (where supported)
- [ ] Collaboration sessions work between two browsers
- [ ] All export formats produce valid output

## Browser Support Matrix
| Feature | Chrome | Firefox | Safari |
|---------|--------|---------|--------|
| WebGPU | ✅ | 🚧 | 🚧 |
| File System Access | ✅ | ❌ | ❌ |
| WebCodecs | ✅ | 🚧 | ❌ |
| WebRTC | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ |

## Risks & Mitigations
- **Risk**: WebGPU not widely available
  - **Mitigation**: Feature flag, graceful fallback to WASM
- **Risk**: File System Access limited support
  - **Mitigation**: Fall back to download/input elements
- **Risk**: Collaboration signaling complexity
  - **Mitigation**: Use simple edge function, not full TURN server

## Dependencies
- Phase 4 (worker orchestration for heavy compute)
- Phase 3 (overlays to display results)
- Edge functions for collaboration signaling","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"epic","created_at":"2025-12-07T16:56:18.260261-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-07T18:47:53.064708-05:00","closed_at":"2025-12-07T18:47:53.064708-05:00","source_repo":".","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"phage_explorer-zkp","depends_on_id":"phage_explorer-ee1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-07T17:04:37.94694-05:00","created_by":"daemon"},{"issue_id":"phage_explorer-zkp","depends_on_id":"phage_explorer-sft","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-07T17:04:39.072129-05:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}
